heroSubtitle: Experience professional pet care and receive exclusive spa offers for your furry friends.
title: Create an account
subtitle: Start your journey with PetStore.vn today.

fullName.label: Full name
fullName.tooShort: Full name must be at least 2 characters

password.label: Password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.weak: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 number

register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.passwordWeak: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 number.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to PetStore.vn.
login.heroSubtitle: Every bath is a joyful moment. Join the PetStore.vn community today.
login.error: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

otp.title: Verify your account
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit verification code to your email. Enter the code to complete registration.
otp.success: Email verified successfully! Redirecting to login...
otp.errorResend: Failed to resend code. Please try again.
otp.footer: By confirming, you agree to PetStore.vn's terms of service and privacy policy for the pet-loving community.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code to reset your password.
forgot.sent: Verification code sent! Check your email inbox.
forgot.error: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your email and set a new password.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.error: Reset password failed. Please try again.
